title: Outputs stay intentional
summary: Two-dimensional navigation is a browser presentation behavior. Default static outputs stay focused on the core path.

cards.title: Presentation mode
cards.body: Includes the core path plus detours and accepts coordinate hashes like x=2,y=1.

cards.title: Deck preview
cards.body: Uses the core path by default so normal review remains concise.

cards.title: Export
cards.body: PDF and PPTX keep the main path unless a later full-path option is requested.

resources.label: Down arrow
resources.body: Open the output detail detour attached to this slide.
